title: Salesforce Integration Mapping
excerpt: I would like to be able to save a recipe/template for mapping fields into Salesforce. Currently each time you create a new board, you have to remap all the fields in Salesforce - which is time consuming and tedious espec…

posts.author: NJE44 (Elizabeth K Coccia)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to save a recipe/template for mapping fields into Salesforce. Currently each time you create a new board, you have to remap all the fields in Salesforce - which is time consuming and tedious especially if you are doing to frequently for the same fields over and over. It would be nice if you could save a template - as you might an automation - so when you add this template to the board, it knows to look for the fields and automatically map them.
OR if you clone a board or make it a template, the integration mapping to Salesforce follows it .
